issues.comment: TestLogger.FromContext returns a brand new, disconnected TestLogger instead of the receiver. Since LoggerMiddleware.logRequest now calls m.logger.FromContext(ctx).Info(...), all log output goes to a throwaway logger that no test code holds a reference to. Any test checking testLogger.InfoLogs.Calls or testLogger.ErrorLogs.Calls will see zero calls. Fix: return `f` instead of `NewTestLogger()`.
